About.title: About Me
About.p1: Hello, I am Muhammad Kelvin, a freelance Web Developer focused on helping SMEs and local businesses present themselves professionally in the digital world.
About.p2: I believe every business, no matter how small, deserves to look credible online. A website is not just a visual display — it is a digital foundation to grow and be known by new customers.
About.p3: With a personal approach, I ensure every project is developed according to your needs, not mass templates. I work directly with clients so the results are efficient, clean, and ready to scale.

whyList.title: Direct Contact with the Developer
whyList.desc: No sales middlemen or managers. You communicate directly with me, the one building the website from scratch to online.

whyList.title: More Efficient Pricing
whyList.desc: No large operational costs like an agency. The results remain professional, the price remains reasonable for SMEs.

whyList.title: Fast & Flexible Communication
whyList.desc: Fast response via WhatsApp. Revisions and feedback are handled directly without long bureaucracy.

whyList.title: Quality Over Quantity
whyList.desc: I only take projects that I can handle optimally — every website is done with detail.

processSteps.title: Consultation & Briefing
processSteps.desc: We discuss your needs, goals, and budget. I will research competitors & your target market

processSteps.title: Proposal & Planning
processSteps.desc: I will send a detailed proposal with timeline, deliverables, and initial wireframes/mockups

processSteps.title: Development
processSteps.desc: I start working on the project with regular updates. You can request revisions at each milestone

processSteps.title: Review & Testing
processSteps.desc: You review the final work, and I make sure everything functions perfectly across all devices

processSteps.title: Launch & Support
processSteps.desc: Project goes live! I will provide tutorials and 30 days of free support

faqs.q: How long does the website creation take?
faqs.a: Depends on the package: Landing page 1-2 weeks, Company profile 3-4 weeks, Digital Catalog 4-6 weeks, Custom 6-10 weeks.

faqs.q: Can I update the website myself?
faqs.a: Yes! I will setup a user-friendly CMS and provide complete tutorials. You can update content without needing to code.
Each package has a revision quota. Starter Package: 2x, Professional: 3x, Business: unlimited during development.
Yes, I provide 30 days of free support for bug fixing and troubleshooting after launch.

faqs.q: Does it include domain and hosting?
faqs.a: Professional and Business packages include 1 year of domain + hosting. Starter package receives setup assistance (separate cost ~Rp 300-500k/year).

faqs.q: What about E-Commerce with payment gateways?
faqs.a: For full e-commerce with a shopping cart and payment gateway (Midtrans, etc.), prices start from Rp 8-10m. Consult first to discuss details.
